text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Good morning! It's a beautiful day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Thank you. I feel refreshed after my day off.
I had the most wonderful dream as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I dreamed that I stuffed myself absolutely silly
with sweets!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... It was truly a fleeting, yet delicious,
moment in time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. ♪ I think I'll be able to apply myself to
my training even more than usual!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now then! In order to fulfill the dearest wish of
the Mejiro family, I shall give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Mejiro McQueen managed to recuperate
both mind and body through her rest.
